title: Decide native LICHEN BLE UUID policy for coexistence
description: Decide whether native LICHEN BLE keeps NUS only in mutually exclusive product mode or moves to LICHEN-specific UUIDs before any combined native-plus-MeshCore firmware image. The current NUS collision makes simultaneous native and MeshCore services unsafe.
design: Decision: native LICHEN BLE keeps NUS only in the current mutually exclusive native product mode. Any firmware image that enables native LICHEN BLE together with a compatibility BLE surface must first move native LICHEN BLE to LICHEN-specific service and characteristic UUIDs; a combined native-plus-MeshCore image must not advertise two NUS services with incompatible payload contracts. Existing native NUS clients remain supported only for exclusive CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE images. New native clients should probe future LICHEN-specific UUIDs first and fall back to NUS only when no compatibility surface is active. Compatibility product images must not rely on native-client NUS fallback, even when the compatibility surface itself uses distinct UUIDs. MeshCore keeps exact NUS UUIDs and MeshCore compatibility naming. Native-plus-MeshCore remains blocked until native UUID migration and tests exist. Native-plus-Meshtastic remains blocked until native UUID migration exists and until the single-session/CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1 owner policy is replaced with tested multi-surface session handling.
acceptance_criteria: Decision records UUID policy, mobile/client discovery impact, migration behavior for existing native clients, and which product modes remain blocked until the decision is implemented.
notes: Completed no-hardware UUID policy decision. docs/ble-app-surface-owner.md now states native LICHEN BLE may keep NUS only in exclusive native product mode; any native-plus-compatibility BLE image must first move native LICHEN BLE to LICHEN-specific UUIDs. Native-plus-MeshCore remains blocked until native UUID migration/tests/client discovery notes exist; native-plus-Meshtastic remains blocked until native UUID migration exists and single-session/CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1 policy is replaced with tested multi-surface session handling. Beads design field mirrors the decision. Checks: git diff --check passed. No Zephyr build required for docs/decision-only change. Reviews: Beauvoir and Raman found P2 consistency gaps; fixed. Helmholtz and Archimedes focused re-reviews reported no remaining P0/P1/P2 findings.
